source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

requirements: Be at least a lay member of Orlanth
Own the land on which one lives
Bear arms to defend the city if able
rights: Obtain justice from the City Ring
Respectful protection by the city guard
Receive a portion of city food supplies

city_ring.summary: The thirteen-member City Ring governs Jonstown, appointed by tribal kings and leading temple high priests.
responsibilities: Control food and communal property distribution
Sacrifice to the city wyter, Hauberk Jon

city_rex.summary: The City Rex heads the City Ring, leads the militia, appoints scribes, and oversees city funds.
city_rex.current_holder: Orngerin Holdfast shortly after the liberation in Earth Season 1625.

security.city_guard: Permanent force of 50 mercenaries, with about 40 part-time deputies.
security.militia: About 500 city fighters can muster quickly, with another 2,500 from local tribes within days.

guilds_and_scribes.guilds: Guilds hold monopolies over trades and act as independent legal bodies.
guilds_and_scribes.free_sages: The Free Sages are the most powerful guild-like body, selling scribal and scholarly services and supporting administration and commerce.

criminal_elements.summary: The city has footpads, burglars, pickpockets, bandits outside the walls, and a Lanbril-connected thief ring called the Night Stalkers.

lunars_after_liberation.summary: After liberation, many Lunars fled, died, or were enslaved, but about 100 remain in the city, especially in the Crafter's Quarter and under temple protection.
